# Leyoxa

> Leyoxa builds AI-powered clinic management software for dental and medical practices across Canada and the United States.

Leyoxa is a healthcare SaaS company focused on automating clinic operations through AI voice agents, mobile patient apps, and custom management dashboards. Products are designed for HIPAA and PHIPA compliance.

## Products

- [DDSMarketing Voice Agent](https://leyoxa.com/page-services.html): 24/7 AI voice agent for dental clinics that answers calls, qualifies leads, books appointments, and provides call summaries with next steps.
- [Smilelink](https://smilelink.app): Mobile patient app and clinic management dashboard for dental and cosmetic clinics. Deployed at a dental practice in Texas.
- [Emergclinic](https://emergclinic.com): Emergency appointment booking platform for medical clinics. Deployed in Toronto, Canada.

## Key Capabilities

- AI voice scheduling with inbound and outbound patient recall
- HIPAA/PHIPA-compliant patient messaging and data handling
- Integration with OpenDental, Dentrix, and other PMS/EHR systems
- Custom mobile apps (iOS + Android) and web dashboards
- Emergency triage and real-time availability routing
